name: Warbringers Of Angrul
short_description: Warbringers of Angrul is a grand strategy RTS where you lead an army on a grand campaign map and command your troops in exciting real time battles. Lead zealous crusaders, brave knights, or savage orcs in bringing war to the world of Angrul.
detailed_description:
Warbringers of Angrul is a real time strategy game that combines the strategy of campaign map gameplay with the excitement of leading your troops in real time battles. You will enter a fantasy world and choose from an array of races and factions to lead to victory over your foes. Using a combination of magic and cold steel, fight and conquer your enemies for the glory of your empire!

To become part of our community, you can join our Discord server.

Current Features

  • Grand Campaign map

  • Massive Real time battles

  • Standalone battle mode

  • Unique troops to recruit into your armies ranging from priests, mages, and musketeers

  • Gain gold by fighting against bandit camps, raiding enemy villages, and conquering hostile cities.

  • Three playable factions:

  • The Kingdom of Arran is a martial kingdom that relies on a mix of heavy infantry and gunpowder to win battles.

  • The Eternal Crusade seeks to ensure humanity's survival and dominance through the use of healing and fire magic combined with their highly trained and zealous troops.

  • The Cult of Astaroth orcs roam the lands in large warbands looking for plunder and battle, combining small expendable rabble and large, well-armored juggernauts in the form of their Cult Guards.

  • A standalone Battle Mode, where you can get right into action.

Want to suggest a feature? Make sure to join our Discord!

supported_languages:
English*, Dutch*, Romanian*, Italian*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*
*languages with full audio support
